meta.title: AntiCrow - AI Coding Partner Connecting Discord and Antigravity
meta.description: Just send a message on Discord and AI codes for you. AntiCrow is a VSCode extension that bridges Discord and Antigravity. From your phone, anywhere.
meta.ogDescription: Discord × Antigravity. Delegate coding to AI from your phone. Results arrive on Discord. That's it.

hero.subtitle: Send a message on Discord. Antigravity codes. Results arrive on Discord. That's it.
hero.successMessage: We'll notify you when the closed beta begins.
hero.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
hero.referralHint: Invite friends to move up the waitlist!
hero.shareXText: Just joined the AntiCrow waitlist! 🐦‍⬛ A new AI × Discord coding experience. Join too!
hero.shareText: Just joined the AntiCrow closed beta! Remote AI coding from your phone is amazing 🚀

features.label: Features
features.subtitle: Control everything about AI coding from Discord. From your phone, anywhere.

items.title: Remote from Phone
items.description: Delegate tasks via Discord even when you're on the go

items.title: Scheduled Tasks
items.description: Register daily or weekly automated tasks with cron expressions

items.title: Agent Team Mode
items.description: Multiple AIs execute tasks in parallel at high speed

items.title: Auto Approve
items.description: Automatically click confirmation dialogs during remote execution

items.title: Memory
items.description: Remember past learnings and apply them to future tasks

items.title: Multi-Workspace
items.description: Automatically create Discord channels for each project

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: Send a message on Discord. AntiCrow handles the rest.

steps.title: Send a Message
steps.description: Just write what you want to do in Discord. Works from your phone too

steps.title: AI Executes
steps.description: AntiCrow automatically launches AI and starts coding

steps.title: Get Results
steps.description: Get notified on Discord when done. Track progress in real-time

security.label: Security
security.subtitle: Your data never leaves your PC. Fully local processing for peace of mind.

items.title: Local Processing
items.description: All processing runs on your PC. No data sent to external servers.

items.title: Encrypted Storage
items.description: Bot Token stored with SecretStorage encryption.

items.title: No Telemetry
items.description: No telemetry or usage statistics collected.

items.question: Can I use it while away from my desk?
items.answer: Yes, anywhere Discord works. As long as your PC is online, you can delegate tasks via Discord from any device — phone, tablet, or another PC.

items.question: Is the Bot Token safe?
items.answer: It's encrypted with SecretStorage and never stored as plaintext. The token is only used locally and never transmitted to external servers.

items.question: Can I manage multiple projects?
items.answer: Discord categories are automatically created for independent project management. Each project gets dedicated channels for organized task tracking.

items.question: Is there a Pro trial?
items.answer: Yes, 14-day free trial. Access all Pro features including Agent Team Mode and Auto Approve.

items.question: Will it support AI tools other than Antigravity?
items.answer: Currently optimized for Antigravity, but support for other AI coding tools is planned. Join the waitlist to stay updated.

cta.subtitle: Take your AI coding experience to the next level with AntiCrow. Join the closed beta waitlist to get early access.

disclaimer.label: Disclaimer
disclaimer.safetyDescription: The AntiCrow extension itself contains no malicious or destructive operations. It is designed to prevent API keys and secret information from being exposed externally. AntiCrow serves as a relay from Discord instructions to Antigravity.
disclaimer.warningDescription: Due to the nature of Antigravity (AI coding editor) that AntiCrow integrates with, the AI may execute unintended actions such as file operations or external service requests. These risks stem from Antigravity's design, not AntiCrow. Use is entirely at your own risk.

risks.title: Automated Operation Risks
risks.description: Antigravity's AI-driven automation may cause unintended file modifications or deletions.

risks.title: Code Modification Risks
risks.description: Code auto-generated or auto-edited by Antigravity's AI may break your existing codebase.

risks.title: API Key Handling
risks.description: AntiCrow is designed to prevent API key exposure, but Antigravity's AI judgment may use keys in unintended ways.

disclaimer.legalParagraph1: The developer assumes no liability for any damages arising from the use of this extension or the connected Antigravity platform, including but not limited to data loss, code corruption, security breaches, business interruption, or other direct and indirect damages. The same applies to risks from Antigravity's AI-driven autonomous decisions.
disclaimer.legalParagraph2: This extension is provided "AS IS" without warranty of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, and non-infringement.
disclaimer.legalParagraph3: The AntiCrow extension itself contains no malicious or destructive code. However, risks arising from Antigravity's AI-driven autonomous actions are inherent to the Antigravity platform, not AntiCrow. The developer assumes no liability for any damages arising from the use of this extension or the connected Antigravity platform. This extension is provided "AS IS" without warranty of any kind.
